plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-539 RP17.P06.M06.S14-RP17.P07.M02.S12 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-539 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP17 p06 closeout p07 foundation: the P06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the nine remaining rows), the full P06 Test And Golden Case Set, Hermes Evidence Packet, Claude Review Packet, and Closeout And Next Handoff cycles, the full P07 Scope Inventory and Contract Draft cycles, and the P07 Type And Shape Definition head (the first twelve rows) as eight descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H17), Claude review packet (C17), and CP00-540 handoff, without opening AI governance, model policy, retrieval scope, or citation runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-539 is a descriptor-only RP17 P06-closeout/P07-foundation pack (150 units, risk C, range RP17.P06.M06.S14-RP17.P07.M02.S12). The pack-level claim is conservative and well-supported: manifest declares production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor; the only positive claim is descriptor verification (production_ready_flag ai_governance_core_p06_closeout_p07_foundation_descriptor_verified / Hermes production_ready_candidate=true), which is backed by the validator script, unit tests, and the full validation suite (all exit 0 in command-evidence.json). Read-tool inspection of the actual sources (registry.js, service.js, validators.js, contract JSON, README, validator script, model.test.js) confirms: (1) coverage of exactly 150 RP17 units with matching deliverable distribution (claude_review 6, ui 17, security_audit 28, test 22, implementation 35, hermes_evidence 5, failure_recovery 35, fixture 2) and micro-title counts, consistent across plan, manifest, registry requirements, contract projection and README; (2) all rows are descriptor_only=true / runtime_execution=false with no_real_data and no-write flags, and the package source contains no fs/child_process/network/write primitives (pure Object.freeze descriptor construction); (3) Claude remains read_only with allowed tools Read/Grep/Glob and claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true (CP00-540), and no enterprise-trust claim from local validation — enforced in code and asserted in tests; (4) Hermes is used only as a deterministic descriptor/evidence packet (receipt_shape ..._no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime; (5) CP178+ review-hardening blockers (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, missing_raw_output_reference/source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_enterprise_trust_claim) are present, and the readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. One non-blocking P3 process note: post-review evidence artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are referenced but not yet present, which is the expected pre-review state of the hardened sequence. Verdict: PASS; does not block pack or goal closeout, with the standard reminder that human final approval and the post-review artifacts/validation must complete before commit.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts referenced but not yet present (expected pre-review state)
findings.details: manifest.evidence_refs and required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-539/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, none of which exist at review time (only manifest.json and command-evidence.json are present in the pack dir). This is consistent with the hardened review sequence: these artifacts are produced by the normalize/receipt-validate/finding-adjudication/construction-inspection steps that run AFTER this read-only Claude review, and pack_level_claude_review.status is correctly 'pending'. Noted as a closeout-gate reminder, not a defect in the reviewed implementation.
findings.recommendation: Before committing/closing out CP00-539, ensure claude-review-result.json is normalized from THIS accepted review and that adjudication.md and construction-inspection.json are generated and pass npm run closeout-pack:validate (and git diff --check --cached). Do not mark the pack closed until all required_pack_artifacts exist and validate.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pre-review state; non-blocking. To be satisfied by the post-review normalize/receipt/adjudication/inspection steps prior to commit.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-539 ai governance core p06 closeout p07 foundation descriptor pack
